lung_capacity_smoking_allowed.value: Lung capacity scores (scale 1–5) of non-smoking staff in the office where smoking was allowed
lung_capacity_smoking_allowed.description: Lung capacity measured on a scale of 1 to 5 for non-smoking staff in the office where smoking was allowed. Compared with lung_capacity_smoking_banned to identify differences in central tendency.

lung_capacity_smoking_banned.value: Lung capacity scores (scale 1–5) of non-smoking staff in the adjacent office where smoking had been banned for a month
lung_capacity_smoking_banned.description: Lung capacity measured on a scale of 1 to 5 for non-smoking staff in the adjacent office where smoking had been banned for a month. Compared with lung_capacity_smoking_allowed to identify differences in central tendency.
